headlines.title: Trump says Iran is ‘making an offer’
headlines.description: President Trump said that Iran is ‘making an offer’ to the U.S. Meanwhile, Iran’s foreign minister arrived in Pakistan, but said negotiations with the U.S. were not scheduled. NBC News’ Keir Simmons reports.

headlines.title: Justice Department ends criminal probe of Powell
headlines.description: The Justice Department announced it would end its criminal investigation into outgoing Fed chair Jerome Powell. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports.

headlines.title: Camp Mystic must undergo changes before it can reopen this summer, Texas officials say
headlines.description: Camp Mystic, the Texas girls camp where 27 died in devastating floods last year, must make a slew of changes in order to reopen this summer, the Texas Department of State Health Services said

headlines.title: US Soldier Arrested for Alleged Insider Betting on Maduro Capture
headlines.description: A U.S. special forces soldier, who was involved in the dramatic raid to capture Venezuela’s Nicolás Maduro, is under arrest and accused of using classified information about the raid to make prediction market bets, ultimately winning him more than $400,000. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY from the White House.

headlines.title: How debris from past hurricanes is fueling raging wildfires in the South
headlines.description: Wildfires raging this week in southern Georgia and northern Florida were fueled by a combination of hot and windy conditions, severe drought and dried-out vegetation from past hurricanes all feeding the blazes

headlines.title: Finding common ground in America
headlines.description: American leaders spoke about finding common ground in America as part of an NBC News initiative in partnership with corporate parent Comcast. NBC News’ Kristen Welker reports.

headlines.title: Sens. Katie Britt and John Fetterman warn against inaction on social media guardrails
headlines.description: The senators warned of the effects on mental health for young people, saying they've co-sponsored bills because they feel a need to put up guardrails for the next generation.

headlines.title: Artemis II mission is giving NASA clues about how to design a moon base
headlines.description: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman told NBC's Lester Holt that lessons from the Artemis II moon mission are informing plans to build d on the lunar surface.

headlines.title: Brandi Chastain on momentum in women’s sports
headlines.description: Famed gold medal soccer player Brandi Chastain recalls the significance of USA’s 1999 World Cup win, and how momentum has grown in women’s sports since the watershed moment. This interview is part of NBC News' Common Ground, sponsored by Comcast.

headlines.title: Astronaut Suni Williams found common ground — in space
headlines.description: Astronaut Suni Williams shares her experience serving aboard the International Space Station and working with other countries – along with the reception she received when she returned home. "Space exploration and taking on these audacious goals draws us together as humans," Williams said. This interview is part of NBC News' Common Ground, sponsored by Comcast.

headlines.title: Sen. Fetterman explains his support for Trump on Iran
headlines.description: Pennsylvania Sen. John Fetterman explains his support for President Trump's efforts in Iran, despite it being "perhaps the most toxic thing a Democrat can embrace." This interview is part of NBC News' Common Ground, sponsored by Comcast.

headlines.title: How Team USA and women’s sports have unified the U.S.
headlines.description: How Team USA and women’s sports have unified the U.S.
